debug.currentQueueQuery:
SELECT count(DISTINCT placa_tracao) as total
            FROM "db_gmo_trusted"."VW_Ciclo"
            WHERE terminal = 'TRO'
              AND try_cast(cheguei as timestamp) >= from_iso8601_timestamp('2026-02-05T04:00:00')
              AND try_cast(cheguei as timestamp) <= from_iso8601_timestamp('2026-02-12T04:00:00')
              AND try_cast(peso_saida as timestamp) IS NULL
